_doc: PINNED BOOT IDENTITY — the single source of the expected md5s every gate/panel/bake/self-test asserts on entry (Guard 5, boot-store assertion). A build that boots on any other store HALTS on line one. Update ONLY at a bake, in the same commit that moves the store; verify_restore.sh, bootstrap.sh, run_panel.sh, ship_gates_check.py and one_source_selftest.py all read THIS file rather than carrying their own hardcoded hex. Origin: stale-boot hardening 2026-07-05 (workspace held baked-v2.4 644d1254 while the repo carried e1b4d8bf; the four data guards validate whichever dir they are imported from, so they never caught the wrong DIRECTORY).
tag: CANDIDATE chapter-3 injury/availability build 2026-07-09 (RL_AVAIL/RL_LTI_RETURN/RL_LTI_CLOCK; _b2hc retired). Store a2fbc9a0 UNCHANGED (no re-seal); register 652d83e8 pinned. Baked reference stays v2.6 head 4b08796c (START_HERE/tag). engine_head/rl_model track the candidate head so Guard 5 (workspace==checkout==pin) passes; owner bakes at his word.
register_note: LTI_REGISTER.md — owner-authored availability sidecar, pinned as a versioned input (R-REG=R2, Chapter-3 2026-07-09). Guard 5 asserts it on entry like the store; bootstrap seeds it to the workspace; the lookalike tripwire (single_source.py) keeps it single. Owner edits it -> this pin moves in the same commit (a curation edit, NOT a store bake).
